name: ChatVLSC least-workspace secure access optimization plan
objective: Use available workspace connectors while joining users into the least number of workspaces and improving secure access to mcp.thevlsc.com for all approved IDP accounts.

minimum_workspace_model.principle: Keep humans in the fewest primary collaboration workspaces; connect service identities through scoped app/service credentials instead of extra user memberships.

pending_identity_evidence: Resolve chatvslc@thevlsc.com vs chatvlsc@thevlsc.com before granting agent access.
Resolve the redacted Google alias mismatch before alias linking.
Confirm whether christian.gid@thevlsc.com exists before any IDP routing.

service_identity_workspace.purpose: Machine access only. Do not invite service accounts as human users unless the target platform requires it.
service_principals: Cloudflare Access service token for RLI Assistant at mcp.thevlsc.com/v1*
Microsoft Entra app registration for ChatVLSC roles and delegated scopes
OpenAI Platform project/app target after reauthentication
Zapier MCP connection for approved workflow automations
secret_storage: approved local ignored env files for development

audit_workspace.purpose: Status and evidence only; no secrets.
systems: Airtable ChatVLSC MCP Three-Stage Configuration Review base

connector_access_matrix.evidence: Cloudflare Observability read vlsc-user-role-mcp id 91640dd38e074604bec987feeec1739d, but live code still lacks the current MCP JSON-RPC reconciliation surface, chatvlsc.thevlsc.mcp alias metadata, and current Workers AI route naming.
connector_access_matrix.least_workspace_action: Use one Cloudflare account/zone for thevlsc.com and one Access application/policy set for RLI Assistant at mcp.thevlsc.com/v1*.
connector_access_matrix.next_gate: Deploy current local Worker and create/select Access service-token credentials.

connector_access_matrix.evidence: Local Graph config exists, but previous write attempts were blocked by app-registration permission.
connector_access_matrix.least_workspace_action: Use one Entra tenant as canonical IDP and link approved external aliases only after spelling/membership reconciliation.
connector_access_matrix.next_gate: Confirm target app object ID or approve creation of the ChatVLSC app registration.

connector_access_matrix.evidence: OpenAI Platform target listing returned UNAUTHORIZED / TRIGGER_REAUTHENTICATION on the 2026-07-09 09:31 CT recheck.
connector_access_matrix.least_workspace_action: Use one OpenAI organization/project for ChatVLSC; do not create keys from chat-pasted raw values.
connector_access_matrix.next_gate: Reauthenticate OpenAI Platform and select the org/project target through the secure connector flow.

connector_access_matrix.evidence: Secure connectivity review page was found and updated with the 2026-07-09 checkpoint.
connector_access_matrix.least_workspace_action: Keep one Notion page as the audit/status control surface rather than creating new duplicate workspace pages.
connector_access_matrix.next_gate: Mark Stage 2 ready only after identity mismatches are resolved.

connector_access_matrix.evidence: Base apptIpzGISh4e46pJ contains staged governance tables and was updated with current gate evidence.
connector_access_matrix.least_workspace_action: Use the existing base as structured review inventory; do not create another Airtable base for the same workflow.
connector_access_matrix.next_gate: Keep Stage 2 in progress until IDP evidence is complete.

connector_access_matrix.evidence: THE-5 was updated with the 2026-07-09 recent-change/access review comment.
connector_access_matrix.least_workspace_action: Keep implementation tracking in THE-5 until Notion/Airtable move the gate to execution-ready.
connector_access_matrix.next_gate: Create narrower Linear work only when a specific approved implementation task is unblocked.

connector_access_matrix.evidence: Slack channel search for chatvlsc mcp thevlsc returned no results on the 2026-07-09 09:31 CT recheck.
connector_access_matrix.least_workspace_action: Do not create a new Slack workspace; use an existing channel only after the destination is identified.
connector_access_matrix.next_gate: Ask for or discover an existing channel if Slack updates are required.

connector_access_matrix.evidence: Current tool discovery exposes no Zapier MCP action tools. Referenced thread 019f3172-cc28-7731-82d5-b44503e946c0 records prior Entra/OneDrive/SharePoint/Notion/To Do action exposure, later blocked by credits/schema execution gates.
connector_access_matrix.least_workspace_action: Use one Zapier MCP connection for approved Entra/OneDrive/SharePoint/Notion automations; avoid duplicate connector workspaces.
connector_access_matrix.next_gate: Reconnect/reauthorize Zapier MCP action tools before attempting workflow execution.

connector_access_matrix.evidence: Figma tools are exposed, but no file key or plan target is available for a design write.
connector_access_matrix.least_workspace_action: Use one shared Figma file or design system for ChatVLSC app and access-flow diagrams.
connector_access_matrix.next_gate: Provide or create a target Figma file before design-system writes.

connector_access_matrix.evidence: tunnel-client/cmd/client had no files modified in the last 48 hours. Existing client supports MCP server URL profiles and env/file-referenced headers.
connector_access_matrix.least_workspace_action: Use tunnel-client profiles for the same mcp.thevlsc.com target instead of separate local tunnel definitions per workspace.
connector_access_matrix.next_gate: Create a profile only after the Cloudflare Access service-token header source is approved.

mcp_connectivity_optimization.target: Primary ChatVLSC current api.thevlsc.com/user_role/v1; RLI Assistant mcp.thevlsc.com/v1 with legacy chatvlsc_dev alias
recommended_auth_layers: Service Auth policy for automation clients using CF-Access-Client-Id and CF-Access-Client-Secret headers
Worker-side identity/role claim checks for human and app-token flows
ChatGPT MCP OAuth protected-resource metadata before app submission
Repeatable local and authenticated production JSON-RPC probes
current_local_status: Local config includes Workers AI /ai/run routing.
Current ChatVLSC /user_role/v1 validates initialize, tools/list, get_service_status, get_workspace_access_reconciliation, evaluate_identity_claims, and plan_file_sort locally.
current_live_status: Cloudflare Worker live code is stale versus local changes.
Workers Builds has no builds for the Worker.
Wrangler is not authenticated in this shell and no Cloudflare deploy/API token environment variable is present.
blocked_tests: Authenticated production MCP JSON-RPC probe needs Cloudflare Access service-token credentials.
OpenAI ChatGPT app target/key work needs OpenAI Platform reauthentication.
Zapier action execution needs current Zapier MCP tool exposure.
IDP account grants need reconciliation of agent spelling, Google alias, and unverified domain GID identity.

access_changes_not_applied: No users were invited or joined to any workspace.
No Cloudflare Access app, policy, or service token was created.
No Entra app registration, app role, OAuth scope, or claim setting was changed.
No OpenAI API key or ChatGPT app target was created.

approval_sequence.name: Identity reconciliation
approval_sequence.exit_criteria: Canonical account list confirms chatvlsc, christian aliases, christian.gid, admin@thevlsc.com, and christian@thevlsc.com.

approval_sequence.name: Cloudflare service-auth setup
approval_sequence.exit_criteria: Access app/policy exists and service-token credentials are stored only outside source.

approval_sequence.name: Production deploy
approval_sequence.exit_criteria: Wrangler deploy succeeds from an authenticated Cloudflare account or approved deploy token, and live Worker code contains /workers-ai/status plus the current MCP JSON-RPC reconciliation surface.

approval_sequence.name: Authenticated MCP probe
approval_sequence.owner_surface: Local test harness and tunnel-client profile
approval_sequence.exit_criteria: Authenticated initialize, tools/list, and sample tools/call pass against primary ChatVLSC api.thevlsc.com/user_role/v1 and RLI Assistant mcp.thevlsc.com/v1.

approval_sequence.name: Connector workspace enablement
approval_sequence.exit_criteria: Only the required existing workspace/project/channel/file is enabled, with no duplicate workspaces created.

implementation_surface_policy: Primary implementation target is ChatVLSC current at api.thevlsc.com/user_role/v1. The mcp.thevlsc.com/v1 route is RLI Assistant, with chatvlsc_dev retained only as a legacy client alias.
